name: Link Checker
description: This component displays a block that checks links. It should have 5 rows. The first row should contain the two images (for safe/unsafe link) followed by a some text a title(h1) and a description.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Primary authored content. Follow the sidekick block page for the exact table/content shape and examples.

usageNotes: The second row should contain the <status-messages> tag (Safe, default-good, default). The third row should contain the text displayed under the input field.
The fourth row should contain the <titles-change> tag (Safe ,So_far_so_good_1 ,So_far_so_good_2 ,Default)
The fifth row should contain the <buttons> tag and the buttons.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
